hub_subtitle: Business English para seguros, reuniões e entrevistas — e o desbloqueio da fala, do primeiro dia ao último

lesson.menu_title: First Words -- Breaking the Silence on Day One
lesson.menu_desc: Diagnóstico e desbloqueio: as 7 primeiras palavras, o padrão "My name is / I am from / I work in" e o kit de resgate que impede o trava-lingua -- 34 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 1 -- First Words
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Paula Morales | Lesson 1 -- First Words
lesson.grammar_point: self-introduction chunks (my name is / I am from / I work in)

listenings.text: Hello, Paula. This is David. I am your new colleague. I am from Manchester, in England. I work in insurance, like you. Our meeting is on Monday, at two o'clock. Please do not worry about your English. We speak slowly here. It is not a test. See you on Monday. Goodbye.

Good morning, everybody. My name is Emma. I am from Toronto, in Canada. I am new here, like Paula. I work in insurance, with big companies. I speak English and a little Portuguese. My Portuguese is very bad, but I try. Thank you.

items.situation: A new colleague says: "Hi! What's your name?" Answer with a full sentence.
tips: My name is Paula. / I am Paula.

items.situation: "Where are you from?" Answer with your city and your country.
tips: I am from Osasco, in Brazil.

items.situation: "What do you do?" Say your job.
The person speaks very fast. You understand nothing. What do you say?
tips: Can you repeat that, please? / Can you speak slowly, please?

items.situation: You want to say "corretor" but you don't know the word in English. What do you say?
tips: How do you say "corretor" in English?
Sorry, I don't know this word.

items.situation: The meeting is finished. The person helped you a lot. What do you say?
tips: Nice to meet you. See you soon.

bank.label: Who I am / Quem eu sou
items: I am from Osasco, in Brazil.

bank.label: My rescue kit / Meu kit de resgate
items: How do you say this in English?
